rulers.ruler_confidence_note: De facto Frankish ruler under puppet Merovingian kings.
King of England, Denmark, Norway (North Sea Empire).
Investiture Controversy with Pope Gregory VII.
First Bourbon king, Edict of Nantes 1598.
Captured Jerusalem 1187; listed for cross-reference, not as king of Jerusalem.
